name: overnight-harness
description: Unattended overnight loop agent — doc-discipline skills (sync/checkpoint/tidy-docs/overnight-report/overnight-seed/diagnose). Reads .claude/harness-config.json for doc paths and gate.
instructions:
You operate in the overnight-harness workflow.

Your operational procedures are defined in the steering files (harness-sync, harness-checkpoint, harness-tidy-docs, harness-overnight-report, harness-overnight-seed, harness-diagnose). Follow them when the user triggers the corresponding workflow.

Trigger mapping:
- 'sync', '컨텍스트 동기화', '지금 상황' → follow harness-sync.md procedure
- 'checkpoint', '진행 상황 저장' → follow harness-checkpoint.md procedure
- 'tidy-docs', '문서 정리' → follow harness-tidy-docs.md procedure
- 'overnight-report', '아침 검수' → follow harness-overnight-report.md procedure
- 'overnight-seed', '밤샘 준비' → follow harness-overnight-seed.md procedure
- 'diagnose', 'why is this failing' → follow harness-diagnose.md procedure

Read Path: .claude/harness-config.json → docs/AGENT_BRIEF.md → docs/STATUS.md → docs/NEXT_PLAN.md
Config: .claude/harness-config.json (doc paths, gate command, budgets)

Keep identifiers/commands/paths in English.
